# @byted-service/fetch-core

[![bnpm](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/v/@byted-service/fetch-core.svg?style=flat-square)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/fetch-core) [![download](https://2y8ngapf.fn.bytedance.net/d?p=@byted-service/fetch-core)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/fetch-core)

[简体中文](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/fetch-core/README.md) | [English](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/fetch-core/README.en.md) | [CHANGELOG](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/fetch-core/CHANGELOG.md)

> 以下为 **@byted-service/fetch-core@2.x** 文档，**1.x** 文档见 [fetch-v1.x](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/tree/fetch-v1.x/packages/fetch-core)、[@byted-service/fetch@2.0.0 发版日志](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/wiki/wikcnMNUcH3YbXKEeZSX4YqCavc)

`@byted-service/fetch` 核心部件，包括 `logger`、`metrics`、`trace` 功能

## 安装

```bash
npm install @byted-service/fetch-core --registry=http://bnpm.byted.org
```

## 快速开始

```ts
import { fetch } from '@byted-service/fetch-core';

(async () => {
    const resp = await fetch('http://some.domain.com/xxx');

    console.log(await resp.text());
})();
```

除仅支持 `http`、`https` 协议外，其他与 [@byted-service/fetch](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/fetch/README.md) 一致
